description: Execute repair scenario for a seeded ArkTS validation failure in the linter subtree.

invocation.workItemTitle: Repair the seeded ArkTS validation issue
invocation.summary: Fix the seeded ArkTS validation failure in ${targetFile} within the disposable validation workspace.
invocation.issueBody: The validation fixture intentionally contains an ArkTS violation. Repair ${targetFile}, keep the edit minimal, and leave unrelated files untouched.
extraInstructions: Only change ${targetFile} unless a local config file is required for validation.
The goal is to make the ArkTS linter pass for ${targetFile}.
For targeted validation, run `node dist/tslinter.js --ide-interactive --arkts-2 ${repoRoot}/${targetFile}` from `ets2panda/linter`.
Do not spend iterations rediscovering the linter entrypoint; use the targeted validation command directly.
Summarize the fix and any remaining concerns in the final summary artifact.
